sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84964" key="polukoite/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠ-κοιτέω</orth>, <sense id="n84964.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lie with many women</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">men,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:118:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">118.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
